tool_metadata.name: notion-get-ideas
tool_metadata.description: Retrieve ideas from Notion database with optional filtering

parameters.toolDescription: Get ideas from the database. Use limit to control number of results (default 10). Optional status filter: 'Not Started', 'In Progress', 'Done'

values.name: limit
values.description: Maximum number of ideas to retrieve (default: 10)

known_issues: daysBack parameter was removed due to property mismatch
